description_long: This object is a sculptural representation of the United States flag, constructed in a layered, three-dimensional format. The flag features three nested rectangles, each painted with the familiar stars and stripes motif, creating a stepped, receding effect. The stars are white on a blue field in the upper left, while the stripes alternate red and white, all rendered with a textured, hand-crafted appearance. The frame and backing appear to be made of wood, with visible brushstrokes and a slightly rustic finish. The object is wall-mounted, with no visible pole or stand, and the layered construction gives it a sense of depth and visual interest. The overall condition appears slightly worn, with some visible aging or patina on the surface.
description: A layered, three-dimensional sculptural American flag with nested rectangles and a rustic, hand-crafted finish. The flag is wall-mounted and features visible texture and slight wear.
description_view_0: A side view showing the pronounced depth and stepped, layered construction of the flag.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full American flag design with three nested rectangles and all stars and stripes visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, again highlighting the depth and layered structure of the flag.
description_view_3: A slightly angled frontal view, similar to view 1, showing the flag's design and layered effect.
attribute_flag_design: The flag features the design of the United States flag, with thirteen alternating red and white stripes and a blue canton containing fifty white stars. The design is repeated in three nested, stepped rectangles, each smaller than the last, creating a layered, three-dimensional effect. The paint is applied with visible texture, and the overall proportions are rectangular.
